channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DBEIL] Deepak Builders Bags L1 Status for ₹474.25 Cr Residential Project at Indian Oil Panipat Refinery Township
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Deepak Builders & Engineers India Limited has emerged as the lowest (L1) bidder for a residential infrastructure project adjacent to the Panipat Refinery & Petrochemical Complex Township of Indian Oil Corporation Limited in Haryana. The project, valued at ₹474.25 crore, involves the construction of 12 high-rise residential buildings using advanced monolithic construction technology. This development is expected to significantly enhance the company's revenue visibility, reinforcing its strong position in executing large-scale, complex, and technology-driven infrastructure projects within institutional and industrial ecosystems.

  • Deepak Builders & Engineers India Limited has secured L1 status for a residential infrastructure project at Indian Oil Corporation Limited's Panipat Refinery & Petrochemical Complex Township.
  • The project is valued at ₹474.25 crore and involves the construction of 12 high-rise residential buildings using advanced monolithic construction technology.
  • Upon formal award, DBEIL’s total order book is expected to scale to approximately ₹32,000 crore, significantly enhancing revenue visibility.
  • This development reinforces Deepak Builders’ strong positioning in executing large-scale, complex, and technology-driven infrastructure projects.
  • The demand for modern residential infrastructure within industrial clusters is expected to remain robust, creating sustained opportunities for experienced EPC players.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Deepak Builders and Engineers India Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [DBEIL] Deepak Builders Bags L1 Status for ₹474.25 Cr Residential Project at Indian Oil Panipat Refinery Township
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Deepak Builders & Engineers India Limited has emerged as the lowest (L1) bidder for a residential infrastructure project adjacent to the Panipat Refinery & Petrochemical Complex Township of Indian Oil Corporation Limited in Haryana. The project, valued at ₹474.25 crore, involves the construction of 12 high-rise residential buildings using advanced monolithic construction technology. This development is expected to significantly enhance the company's revenue visibility, with the total order book estimated to scale to approximately ₹32,000 crore upon formal award. The win aligns with broader industry tailwinds, including increased investments in refinery expansions, industrial townships, and urban infrastructure development.

  • Deepak Builders & Engineers India Limited has secured L1 status for a residential project at Indian Oil Panipat Refinery Township.
  • The project is valued at ₹474.25 crore and involves the construction of 12 high-rise residential buildings.
  • Upon formal award, the company's total order book is expected to reach approximately ₹32,000 crore.
  • This win reinforces Deepak Builders’ strong position in executing large-scale, complex, and technology-driven infrastructure projects.
  • The demand for modern residential infrastructure within industrial clusters is expected to remain robust.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Deepak Builders and Engineers India Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [DALBHARAT] Dalmia Bharat Ltd. Cement Sales Affected by Kiln Breakdown in Odisha
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dalmia Bharat Ltd. has reported a sudden breakdown in one of its kilns at Rajgangpur, Odisha on 13th March 2026. The kiln, which contributes significantly to the total clinker consumption in grinding units in Odisha, West Bengal, and Jharkhand, was out of order for 14 days. This resulted in a reduction of almost 2.5 ~ 3.0 Lac Tons in cement sales in the company's key eastern markets in March 2026. The company regrets the disruption in supplies to its channel partners and is taking necessary measures to normalize supply chains at the earliest.

  • Sudden breakdown in Dalmia Bharat Ltd.'s kiln at Rajgangpur, Odisha
  • Kiln out of order for 14 days
  • Reduction of 2.5 ~ 3.0 Lac Tons in cement sales in March 2026
  • Disruption in supplies to channel partners
  • Measures taken to normalize supply chains

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dalmia Bharat Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [JAYATMA] Jayatma Enterprises Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure
item.description:
Jayatma Enterprises Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015 and SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will commence from Wednesday, 1st April 2026, and will remain in effect until 48 hours after the declaration of the Company's Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Year ended March 31, 2026. Designated persons and their immediate relatives are prohibited from trading during this period.

  • Trading window closure announced by Jayatma Enterprises Ltd
  • Closure in accordance with SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015 and SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Closure to commence from Wednesday, 1st April 2026
  • Closure to remain in effect until 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Year ended March 31, 2026
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives prohibited from trading during this period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jayatma Enterprises Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [EPL] EPL Ltd Approves Merger with Indovida India Private Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

EPL Ltd has approved the execution of a Merger Implementation Agreement with Indovida India Private Limited. The merger is subject to necessary statutory and regulatory approvals and is expected to be on a going concern basis under Sections 230 to 232 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013. The merger is expected to be at arm's length basis.

  • EPL Ltd approved the execution of a Merger Implementation Agreement with Indovida India Private Limited.
  • The merger is subject to necessary statutory and regulatory approvals.
  • The merger is expected to be on a going concern basis under Sections 230 to 232 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013.
  • The merger is expected to be at arm's length basis.
  • Indorama Netherlands B.V. holds 24.44% stake in the Company and 99.99% of the share capital of Indovida India.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EPL Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [SOLARWORLD] Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd Receives Award from NTPC Limited for BESS Implementation at Solapur Super Thermal Power Station
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd, a company based in India, has received an award from NTPC Limited (Formerly National Thermal Power Corporation Limited) for the Engineering, Procurement and Construction (EPC) Package for BESS Implementation at Solapur Super Thermal Power Station (Lot-1). The award has a capacity of 132 MW/ 264 MWh and an approximate value of INR 314.26 Cr. (Excl. Taxes). The completion of the facilities is expected to be within 15 months.

  • Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd received an award from NTPC Limited for BESS Implementation at Solapur Super Thermal Power Station
  • The award has a capacity of 132 MW/ 264 MWh and an approximate value of INR 314.26 Cr. (Excl. Taxes)
  • The completion of the facilities is expected to be within 15 months
  • NTPC Limited is a domestic entity
  • The order does not fall under related party transactions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd | Category: Award

item.title: [DMART] Avenue Supermarts Ltd Opens 3 New Stores Across India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Avenue Supermarts Ltd, the company that operates the popular retail chain DMart, has announced the opening of 3 new stores. The new stores are located at Pipla, Nagpur (Maharashtra), AU Family Hub, Ghaziabad (Uttar Pradesh), and Vijay Nagar, Jabalpur (Madhya Pradesh). This brings the total number of DMart stores to 481.

  • Avenue Supermarts Ltd opens 3 new stores
  • New stores located in Nagpur, Ghaziabad, and Jabalpur
  • Total number of DMart stores now stands at 481

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avenue Supermarts Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [EPL] EPL Ltd Board Approves Scheme of Amalgamation with Indovida India Private Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

EPL Ltd has announced the approval of a scheme of amalgamation with Indovida India Private Limited. The merger is subject to necessary statutory and regulatory approvals, including approval from the BSE Limited, National Stock Exchange of India Limited, Securities and Exchange Board of India, the requisite majority of shareholders and creditors, the jurisdictional National Company Law Tribunal, the Competition Commission of India, and other required approvals. The merger is expected to be on a going concern basis, with the equity shares of the Company to be issued and allotted to the shareholders of Indovida India in accordance with the share exchange ratio stipulated in the Scheme.

  • EPL Ltd Board approves scheme of amalgamation with Indovida India Private Limited
  • Subject to necessary statutory and regulatory approvals
  • Merger to be on a going concern basis
  • Equity shares of the Company to be issued and allotted to Indovida India shareholders
  • Share exchange ratio to be determined by joint valuation report and fairness opinion

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EPL Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [EPL] EPL and Indovida to Merge, Creating a $1 Billion Consumer Packaging Leader for Emerging Markets
item.description:
🔥 Trending

EPL Limited and Indovida India Private Limited have signed definitive agreements to merge, forming a $1 billion revenue entity with a combined valuation of ~$2 billion. This merger will create one of the largest emerging markets packaging platforms that combines complementary offerings and capabilities, expands global reach, enhances growth potential and improves margin and return metrics. The transaction values EPL at INR 339 per share, 70% higher than Friday’s closing price; Indovida is valued at a ~35% discount to the multiple ascribed to EPL. Indorama Ventures will become a co-promoter of the Company holding 51.8% ownership. Blackstone will own 16.6% stake in the merged entity. The merger is expected to result in sizable synergies driven by complementary geographic footprint and products, procurement & supply chain efficiency, and strong sustainability initiatives of both the companies.

  • EPL and Indovida have signed definitive agreements to merge, creating a $1 billion revenue entity with a combined valuation of ~$2 billion
  • Indorama Ventures will become a co-promoter of the Company holding 51.8% ownership, Blackstone will own 16.6% stake in the merged entity
  • The merger values EPL at INR 339 per share, 70% higher than Friday’s closing price, Indovida is valued at a ~35% discount to the multiple ascribed to EPL
  • The merger is expected to result in sizable synergies driven by complementary geographic footprint and products, procurement & supply chain efficiency, and strong sustainability initiatives of both the companies
  • The merged entity will leverage EPL and Indovida’s industry leading positions in emerging markets and complementary geographical presence to drive higher growth

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: EPL Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [SETCO] Setco Automotive Ltd. Approves Sale of Stake in Subsidiary for INR 185 Crores and Non-Compete Agreement for INR 70 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Setco Automotive Ltd. has approved the sale of a 41% stake in its material subsidiary, Setco Auto Systems Private Limited (SASPL), to RSB Transmissions (I) Limited for approximately INR 185 Crores. The transaction is subject to adjustments based on net debt and working capital position of SASPL. Additionally, the company has approved a non-compete agreement with the purchaser, agreeing not to engage in any business that competes with SASPL for a period of 3 years from the date of expiry of 6 months from the closing date. The company will also change its corporate name to ‘Shilayan Industries Limited’.

  • Setco Automotive Ltd. to sell 41% stake in its subsidiary, Setco Auto Systems Private Limited, for approximately INR 185 Crores
  • The transaction is subject to adjustments based on net debt and working capital position of SASPL
  • Company has also approved a non-compete agreement with the purchaser
  • The company will cease usage of the ‘Setco’ brand/trade name
  • Company will change its corporate name to ‘Shilayan Industries Limited’

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SETCO AUTOMOTIVE LTD. | Category: Deals
